parameters.query: WITH lead AS (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE lower(email) = lower($1)), email AS (SELECT id FROM campaign_emails WHERE message_id = $2) INSERT INTO email_replies (email_id, lead_id, reply_content, reply_type, sentiment) SELECT email.id, lead.id, $3, $4, $5 FROM lead LEFT JOIN email ON true RETURNING id, lead_id, reply_type;
INSERT INTO suppression_list (email, reason, source) VALUES ($1, 'unsubscribed', 'reply-handler') ON CONFLICT (lower(email)) WHERE email IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING;
